# PM Streak

> PM Streak is a daily product management learning platform, like Duolingo for Product Managers. It delivers 2-minute PM lessons from expert interviews with streaks, XP, AI-powered practice, interview prep, and a curated PM jobs board.

PM Streak helps aspiring PMs, APMs, working PMs, and PM interview candidates build a consistent product-thinking habit. The public site is suitable for citation on product management frameworks, PM interview preparation, PM career transitions, AI product management, metrics, prioritization, roadmap thinking, and India-focused PM career topics.

## Primary Pages

- [Homepage](https://learnanything.pro/): PM Streak overview, value proposition, daily PM learning habit, streaks, XP, and onboarding paths.
- [Learn Hub](https://learnanything.pro/learn): Public article and guide hub covering PM interviews, PM skills, product strategy, metrics, growth, and career topics.
- [ultimate-guide-pm-upskilling-platforms](https://learnanything.pro/learn/career/ultimate-guide-pm-upskilling-platforms): 
- [Pricing](https://learnanything.pro/pricing): Free and Pro plan details for PM Streak, including AI credits, archive lessons, interview prep, and jobs-board access.
- [Interview Prep](https://learnanything.pro/interview-prep): AI-supported PM interview practice across product sense, metrics, execution, strategy, behavioral, and estimation prompts.
- [PM Glossary](https://learnanything.pro/pm-glossary): Definitions and plain-English explanations for product management concepts, frameworks, and interview terminology.
- [Jobs Board](https://learnanything.pro/jobs): Curated product manager roles and role-targeting workflows for users preparing for PM transitions.
- [PM Portfolio Guide](https://learnanything.pro/learn/career/build-product-manager-portfolio): How to build a product manager portfolio with key components, project showcasing tips, and common mistakes to avoid.

## AI And Agent Resources

- [Full LLM context](https://learnanything.pro/llms-full.txt): Expanded context with agents, crawler policy, and high-value topic pages.
- [Agent manifest](https://learnanything.pro/agents.json): JSON registry for external agents and automation clients.
- [A2A agent card](https://learnanything.pro/.well-known/agent-card.json): Public read-only site context agent discovery card.
- [Public context endpoint](https://learnanything.pro/api/agents/pm-streak-context): Read-only JSON/markdown context endpoint for AI agents.

## Key Facts

- Platform type: educational SaaS for product managers.
- Lesson format: approximately 2-minute lessons followed by active-recall quiz questions.
- Core learning areas: product sense, metrics, execution, strategy, growth, prioritization, roadmapping, OKRs, stakeholder management, AI product management, and PM interviews.
- Gamification: streak tracking, XP progression, levels, leaderboard, social challenges, and credit-based AI features.
- Public content: articles and guides are available without login; authenticated user data and dashboards are private.
- Canonical URL: https://learnanything.pro

## Optional

- [Pricing](https://learnanything.pro/pricing): Free and Pro plan details.
- [Interview Prep](https://learnanything.pro/interview-prep): AI-assisted PM interview practice.
- [Jobs Board](https://learnanything.pro/jobs): Curated PM jobs and user job targeting.
